ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot enthusiastically opening its arms to welcome customers, reflecting the 'open for business' meaning of the emoji.  The movement will be welcoming and inviting.  The sequence will use both arms in a symmetrical pattern for a balanced and clear message. Frame 1 shows the arms at rest. Frame 2 begins the outward motion. Frame 3 shows the arms fully extended, welcoming. Frame 4 brings the arms back slightly, maintaining the welcoming posture without overextension.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready to open
arms sweep outwards and up, invitingly
arms open wide, a grand welcome
arms settle, still open and welcoming
